blockingIssues.description: Wallet dropdown labels quote balance as USD1 but still reads `balances.usdc.available`, so the USD1 source mapping requirement is not satisfied.
Reseed script hardcodes a deployer private key in source (`scripts/src/reseed-testnet.ts`) instead of loading it from local config or environment.
Demo wallet setup script hardcodes a deployer private key fallback in source (`scripts/src/setup-demo-wallet.ts`).
USD1 orderbook balance reporting uses `balances.usdc.available` and USDC-decimal scaling, producing incorrect USD1 balance output.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Replace hardcoded mainnet-only wallet derivation guidance with environment-aware guidance so testnet milestones do not conflict with skill instructions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: wallet-testnet-polymarket-login required `Network.TESTNET`, while frontend-worker skill guidance currently directs `Network.MAINNET` for derivation settings.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit branch for operational on-chain scripts: require live execution verification, enforce secret loading from env/profile (no hardcoded fallback keys), and allow pragmatic non-TDD flow for one-shot operational scripts.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both heavy-reseed-testnet and demo-wallet-setup-script introduced hardcoded deployer key fallbacks; heavy-reseed-testnet also reported mismatch with mandatory TDD step for a one-shot live script.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document Aptos testnet faucet instability/deprecation handling and a safe deployer-transfer fallback pattern for account funding in live-demo workflows.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: verify-live-demo required repeated fallback handling due faucet failures and explicitly requested this skill guidance in feedback.

rejectedObservations.observation: WebSocket healthcheck command masks failures because it always succeeds via `|| echo "ws check"`.
rejectedObservations.reason: Not applied in this run because changing it requires mutating an existing services.yaml entry (non-additive shared-state change).

rejectedObservations.observation: Architecture library note saying `wallet-provider.tsx` should not be modified.
rejectedObservations.reason: Deferred because this is guidance curation and should be handled by orchestrator alongside broader AGENTS/skill updates.
Already represented as concrete blocking implementation issues in feature reviews; not independently actionable as a shared-state update in this pass.
